title: narcissus pseudonarcissus var. minor
intro: Narcissus pseudonarcissus var. minor, also known as the wild daffodil or lesser narcissus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Narcissus pseudonarcissus var. minor include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are made by drying and processing the flowers, leaves, and bulbs, and can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
